title: Scout Recrafted
description: Updated Scout mod for Fabric 1.21.1/1.21.11/1.20.1 and Forge 1.20.1, with improved stability, compatibility, and bug fixes
body:
# Scout Recrafted

Scout Recrafted is a non-official port of the original [Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout) mod for modern Minecraft versions.

This project is currently available for:
- Fabric 1.21.1
- Fabric 1.21.11
- Fabric 1.20.1
- Forge 1.20.1

It aims to preserve the original Scout experience while improving stability, compatibility, and inventory behavior for newer versions of the game.

## Features
- Wearable satchels and pouches
- Extra inventory space through equipped bags
- Expanded inventory access for bag contents
- Visual bag rendering on the player model
- Bag content preview tooltips
- Support for modern modded setups

## Commands

Scout includes admin commands for managing the bag item blacklist:

- /scout blacklist add <item>

  Blocks an item from being stored inside Scout bags.

- /scout blacklist remove <item>

  Removes an item from the blacklist.

- /scout blacklist list

  Shows all currently blocked items.

**Works with items from any loaded mod.**

## Crafting Recipes
